scripts.postbuild:spa-fallback: cp dist/sampurna-shrestha/browser/index.html dist/sampurna-shrestha/browser/404.html || cp dist/sampurna-shrestha/index.html dist/sampurna-shrestha/404.html
scripts.postbuild:cname: if [ -f CNAME ]; then cp CNAME dist/sampurna-shrestha/browser/CNAME; fi
scripts.deploy:github: npm run build:github && npm run postbuild:spa-fallback && npm run postbuild:cname && npx gh-pages -d dist/sampurna-shrestha/browser -b gh-pages
scripts.deploy:domain: npm run build:domain && npm run postbuild:spa-fallback && npm run postbuild:cname && npx gh-pages -d dist/sampurna-shrestha/browser -b gh-pages
